creator: root@adsl-63-197-80-75.dsl.snfc21.pacbell.net
text:
An update is requested for kpilot port to install in kde.2 
	environment without fetching all kde.1 packages

Fix: 

Please update kpilot to build with kdecore4, if possible
How-To-Repeat: 	Install kde.2, go to /usr/ports/palm/kpilot, run make
